entry.title: About Me
entry.content:
I am a data analytics professional with over 5 years of experience in the financial services industry. I love helping businesses use data to ask more productive questions, solve problems and better serve their customers.

In my current role as a data analyst at U.S. Bank, I use tools like SQL, Python, and Tableau to extract, analyze, and visualize data for thousands of users. I am also a student in the Statistics M.S. program at Texas A&M with an empahsis in Applied Analytics & Data Science. In this program, I’ve developed deep knowledge of statistical theory and machine learning as well as extensive experience analyzing data and building models with R.

I live in St. Paul, MN, along with my wife Jen and our 2 cats, Artemis and Apollo. When I’m not working or studying, you’ll usually find me reading, listening to podcasts, or battling beholders with friends in Dungeons & Dragons (virtually, these days).
entry.summary: I am a data analytics professional with over 5 years of experience in the financial services industry. I love helping businesses use data to ask more productive questions, solve problems and better serve their customers.
